The Process

How It Works

Three clear stages. Zero fluff. Built around your life.

Step 01

Apply & Assess

Fill in the short application form. We assess if this community is right for you — you'll hear back within 24 hours and we'll set up a call to go through your goals and starting point.

Step 02

Your Custom Plan

Training, nutrition, and lifestyle — built entirely around you. No generic templates. Everything is designed to fit your schedule, body, and goal.

Step 03

Execute & Evolve

Weekly check-ins, programme updates, and direct access to your coach. As you progress, the plan evolves. You're never left to figure it out alone.

The Programme

What You Get

This isn't a generic 12-week plan. It's a fully personalised coaching experience built around you — your goals, your body, your life.

  • Custom Training Programme Written for your level, goals, and equipment. Updated as you progress.
  • Personalised Nutrition Plan No extreme diets. A sustainable approach that actually fits your lifestyle.
  • Weekly Check-ins Regular reviews of your progress — with honest feedback and adjustments.
  • Direct Coach Access Message any time. Questions answered. You're never on your own.
  • Full Lifestyle Support Sleep, stress, recovery — the full picture, not just what happens in the gym.
Included

Physique Development

Build muscle, reduce body fat, and improve your overall look. Specialist programming tailored to your aesthetic goals.

Included

Performance & Strength

Get stronger, move better, and build a body that performs — not just one that looks good.

Included

Lifestyle & Mindset

Real accountability and the mindset shifts that make results stick long-term — not just for 12 weeks.

The Coach

Meet The Team

Head Coach

Luca Sargeant

Luca has over 6+ years of training experience — always drawn to the discipline, the detail, and the pursuit of a better physique. What started as a personal pursuit became a lifestyle — and eventually, a competitive career.

In 2025, Luca stepped on stage and competed in the Men's Physique Junior division — and won. Rather than chase the stage again, he made a different decision.

He launched NØMESSIN' Coaching — built around three things:

01 Continuous self-development
02 Mindset-focused coaching
03 Results that are built to last
6+ Years Training Experience
Men's Physique Junior — 2025 Champion
Founder — NØMESSIN' Coaching
L3 Diploma — Gym Instructing & Personal Training
